fullTitle: Emirates Dubai Office in United Arab Emirates
address: Emirates Group Headquarters, PO Box 686, Dubai, United Arab Emirates

content.introP1: has been headquartered in Dubai since its founding in 1985, making the Dubai office the central hub for all passenger services, reservations, and travel assistance across the globe.
content.introP2: The Emirates Office in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, offers comprehensive support covering flight bookings, itinerary changes, baggage policies, visa assistance, and Skywards loyalty program queries. Passengers visiting in person receive premium service from a well-trained multilingual team.
content.overviewDesc: The Emirates Dubai Office is located at the iconic Emirates Group Headquarters in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. As the airline's home base, this office provides the most complete range of services available to passengers. From first-time flyers to frequent business travelers, the team is equipped to handle every travel requirement efficiently.
content.servicesDesc: The Emirates Office in Dubai provides an extensive range of passenger services including ticket bookings, flight modifications, baggage assistance, visa guidance, and Skywards membership support. Passengers can walk in during office hours or call the dedicated helpline for immediate assistance with any travel-related matter.
content.airportDesc: Emirates operates the majority of its flights out of Dubai International Airport (DXB), one of the busiest airports in the world. Terminal 3 is exclusively used by Emirates and is equipped with world-class lounges, check-in facilities, and retail options for a premium pre-flight experience.
content.fleetDesc: Emirates operates one of the world's largest and most modern fleets, featuring wide-body aircraft built for long-haul comfort. The fleet is maintained to the highest international safety standards, with regular audits conducted by global aviation authorities to ensure airworthiness on every route.
content.mapDesc: Use the interactive map below to locate the Emirates Dubai Office at the Emirates Group Headquarters. Dubai's well-connected metro and road network make the office easily accessible from all major parts of the city.
content.conclusionDesc: The Emirates Dubai Office stands as the global flagship service center for one of the world's leading airlines. Whether you need help with a booking, baggage claim, upgrade request, or loyalty points, the Dubai office delivers a high standard of assistance befitting the Emirates brand. The knowledgeable team ensures every passenger receives the care and attention they deserve before, during, and after their journey.

airport.name: Dubai International Airport
airport.address: Airport Road, Dubai, United Arab Emirates

faqs.question: Where is the Emirates main office in Dubai?
faqs.answer: The Emirates main office is at Emirates Group Headquarters, PO Box 686, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

faqs.question: What are the working hours of the Emirates Dubai office?
faqs.answer: The Emirates Dubai office is open Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM.

faqs.question: Can I manage my Skywards account at the Dubai office?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Dubai office provides full support for Skywards loyalty program queries including points redemption, tier upgrades, and account management.

faqs.question: Which terminal does Emirates use at Dubai Airport?
faqs.answer: Emirates exclusively operates from Terminal 3 at Dubai International Airport (DXB).
